title: Fix Auto-Applied Filters on Reports and Dashboards Page Load
story: As a DataTools Pro user navigating to the Reports and Dashboards page, I want the data table to show all records by default without any pre-applied filters, so that I start with a complete view.
description: Bug fix: the Reports and Dashboards data table was auto-filtering on page load even when no filter was explicitly set by the user. The table should display all records by default when first navigating to the page.
acceptance_criteria: Data table shows all records on initial page load
No filters are pre-applied unless explicitly set by the user or a view
Filter dropdowns show 'All' as the default selection
ux_changes: Fixed data table to display all records without auto-applied filters on page load.
implementation_notes: Filter state was persisting across page navigations. Reset logic was added for initial page load.
comment_summary: Waqar reported the issue. Balaji worked on the fix.
